tasks.action: 🎯 2 products stopped — lead with OPTIBOND SOLO PLUS

Master-CM1486131.competitor: Dentsply / 3M (via Dental Whale Savings Network — now Synergy GPO)
Master-CM1486131.notes: Rebranded Jan 2024 — now Wave Dental Professionals (thedepg.com), CEO Dr. Steven Wingfield, HQ Dearborn Heights MI. Cut ties with Dental Whale entirely. Brian Kimble is Regional Ops Leader — 20+ yrs experience, best contact for NE territory. Corporate was promoting Dentsply/3M via their old GPO. Now under Synergy GPO — possible opening to renegotiate supply relationships.

Master-CM106952.notes: National Diamond contract. National acct mgr focused on Texas growth, not NE. Make the data case to get NE attention.

Master-CM098299.procurementContact: Jon Prod — COO, Midwest & Northeast Regions
Master-CM098299.competitor: Unknown — formulary-controlled ordering portal may be limiting Kerr visibility
Master-CM098299.notes: Jon Prod (Jon.Prod@smilebrands.com) owns Northeast ops including CT/MA/RI/NY. Based Minneapolis MN. Former CFO at Midwest Dental — procurement-minded, understands formulary and vendor SLAs. KEY INSIGHT: Smile Brands runs a clinical formulary with an online ordering portal controlling what offices can buy. $258/office may be a formulary inclusion problem not a compliance problem. If Kerr isn't prominently placed in their ordering portal, offices won't buy. This is a vendor relationship conversation at the formulary level, not a field sales conversation. HQ: Costa Mesa CA. 700 offices nationally, 33 in your territory.

Master-CM128801.notes: HQ: Framingham MA. Founded 2004. PE-backed by Abry Partners. 43 locations in CT/MA/NH/NJ — entirely in your territory. Runs centralized GROUP PURCHASING for all affiliates — supply decisions made at corporate not office level. CY trending up strongly ($7,334 vs PY $1,156 Q1) — something changed this year. Worth finding out who manages group purchasing at HQ. Email format likely FirstLast@drdental.com or through mydrdental.com. This is your best momentum play — they're already buying more this year.

Master-CM1191419.notes: REBRANDED Jan 2026 — now Archway Dental Partners (archway.dental). CEO Adam Richichi, nearly 25 years in dentistry. Was Dental Associates of Connecticut, started as 4-location CT practice, now 40+ locations CT/NY expanding to MA. Spoke at 2026 Yankee Multi-Site Summit. 35% of dentists are equity partners. Your highest-revenue DSO at $3,272/office/yr — already ABOVE the $747 benchmark. This is a RETENTION play not a new business play. They're your best account — protect it and grow it. Platinum tier confirmed from data. Focus on clinical formulary positioning to keep Kerr prominent as they expand.
